name: monitor
description: Monitor your Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode sessions — a usage dashboard plus a per-project cockpit with a decision trail, live session view, needs-your-call bridge, and thoughtful auto-logging.

hooks.command: echo 'Thoughtful mode is on for this session: when you finish something genuinely worth recording (a non-obvious decision, deliberate-but-odd code, a tricky learning, or a sharp caveat), spawn a background fork (Agent tool, `subagent_type` set to `fork`, not omitted) running `/cockpit scribe`. One fork per logical chunk; skip trivial edits.' || true
